reviews.review_description: Not a very good app.  Expected much better
This is a terrible time not to be able to download this app ESPECIALLY when my BALTIMORE RAVENS are having a Spectacular Season this year...., So SAD and VERY DISAPPOINTING!!!😡😡😡
IIRC the loading room might have been 3d though, so theres that.

Was excited to see an NFL app, but 1st impressions, it's a real mess. It's a chaotic mix of random plays from several past games. You do get to watch them from different angles, sideline, end zones, bleachers etc, but none of them are any better , actually worse than just watching normal video. They are not in VR, and not at all immersive, even though all the cameras present on field, could make this happen. Then there are some plays you can sort of analyze in still frame, with fuzzy renditions of players, and it's based on plays that were not special in any sort of way. They are just normal catches and such you see in any game. And you can rotate and zoom in, Why? Why would you care about giving them such fine analyzing. The interfaces look slick, and polished, but the whole experience, has no direction, and even for a football fan,leaves me to wonder, what's the point? but it's free, and interesting to see where it go's from here
I downloaded this look like a good idea but never got out of the loading screen .
It don’t work  and it takes me back to home screen
NFL season been started and they haven’t updated it yet, they have stuff from a year ago. Why have the app if you’re not going to do anything with it. Two thumbs down. Not worth the down load.
Not much going on this app. Seems more like a demo something more to come...potentially? Sparse and random and the video is not very clear. Great idea implemented poorly.
Only a handful of play replays. Would love to see full games with sideline view.

Seeing the NFL logo and entering the main lobby I assumed that it would be something I could watch football with. Even if I had to pay a fee to watch games live, or have the option to watch a previous full game. It has potential, but I’d love to see more from it.
I was expecting a lot more. Buggy and very laggy.

Thought this would be something I could watch a live game with friends or even like I was in the stands but no. It’s just a view minor highlights and scores.  So much potential is completely lost. 
Add live games, even if 2D and that will make it 100x better
